stories_covered: Story 1: onSave called with product+routineTarget='none'; product has a valid id; empty name blocks save
Story 2: RoutineTargetPicker chips (Skip/AM/PM/AM & PM) and section heading absent in both add and edit mode
Story 3: edit mode calls onSave with existing product.id; reflects updated name; button label is 'Save Changes'
Story 4: no emoji ⚠️ in either INCI notice; Feather alert-triangle icon present in both; text content preserved
